text: After searching a suspiciously looking person, you have found nothing. What action will you take?

options.text: Let them roam around the restricted compartments freely
Ask the crew to keep an eye on him
Hand them over to the engine workshop as a worker
Detain them in a dark hold space without notification

explanation: If a person is suspicious, the primary objective is to maintain observation and control without escalating the situation unnecessarily. Alerting the crew ensures situational awareness, allowing for coordinated monitoring until the person leaves or is properly identified/handled.
